_comment: Apps-SDK / MCP connector manifest for the Company Dossier ChatGPT App. The MCP server is LIVE at https://mcp.companydossier.lol/mcp (Streamable HTTP, bearer auth). The Apps SDK manifest schema is still evolving; fields with a sibling _verify note should be confirmed against https://developers.openai.com/apps-sdk before formal submission. To TEST now you do not need this file — add the server in ChatGPT developer mode (see README). This manifest is for the listing/submission step.
_schema_version_note: _verify current Apps SDK manifest schema_version before submitting
name: Company Dossier
description: Build a complete, sourced intelligence dossier on any company or domain from public data: overview, people, hiring, funding, locations, tech stack, news, relationships, and risk flags — every claim cited and confidence-tagged.
_category_note: _verify exact category slug (e.g. research / productivity) against the current Apps SDK category list

tools.name: build_dossier
tools.description: Build a nine-section, sourced public-data dossier on a company. Input a company name or domain; returns overview & identity, people & org chart, hiring radar, money trail, locations, tech fingerprint, news & timeline, relationship web, and risk flags — each claim attributed to a public source and tagged High/Medium/Low confidence.

target.description: Company name or domain, e.g. 'Acme Robotics' or 'acme.com'.

sections.description: Optional comma-separated subset of the nine sections to build; omit for all.

auth._comment: The endpoint requires Authorization: Bearer <token>. The token is configured in the ChatGPT connector settings (custom header) and is NOT stored in this file or the repo. For a public Store listing serving arbitrary users, migrate to OAuth 2.1 (per-user) or add usage metering — a single shared bearer is intended for private / developer-mode use.
